title: 追求卓越
subtitle: Pursuit of Excellence, Striving for Greatness, Continuous Improvement
assistant_message: Learn to discuss the pursuit of excellence, striving for greatness, and continuous self-improvement.

examples.chinese: 追求卓越不仅需要能力，而且需要毅力。
examples.translation: The pursuit of excellence requires not only ability but also perseverance.
examples.translation_id: Pengejaran keunggulan tidak hanya membutuhkan kemampuan tetapi juga ketekunan.

examples.chinese: 无论遇到什么困难，都要坚持追求卓越。
examples.translation: No matter what difficulties you encounter, persist in the pursuit of excellence.
examples.translation_id: Tidak peduli kesulitan apa yang Anda hadapi, bertahanlah dalam pengejaran keunggulan.

examples.chinese: 实现卓越的关键在于持续学习和改进。
examples.translation: The key to achieving excellence lies in continuous learning and improvement.
examples.translation_id: Kunci mencapai keunggulan terletak pada pembelajaran dan perbaikan berkelanjutan.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Lou Ying
dialogue.chinese: 追求卓越不仅需要能力，而且需要毅力。你觉得什么样的人能追求卓越？
dialogue.pinyin: Zhuīqiú zhuóyuè bùjǐn xūyào nénglì, érqiě xūyào yìlì. Nǐ juéde shénme yàng de rén néng zhuīqiú zhuóyuè?
dialogue.translation: The pursuit of excellence requires not only ability but also perseverance. What kind of people do you think can pursue excellence?
dialogue.translation_id: Pengejaran keunggulan tidak hanya membutuhkan kemampuan tetapi juga ketekunan. Menurut Anda, orang seperti apa yang dapat mengejar keunggulan?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zuo Feng
dialogue.chinese: 无论遇到什么困难，都要坚持追求卓越。成功者往往有明确的目标和不懈的努力。
dialogue.pinyin: Wúlùn yùdào shénme kùnnán, dōu yào jiānchí zhuīqiú zhuóyuè. Chénggōng zhě wǎngwǎng yǒu míngquè de mùbiāo hé bùxiè de nǔlì.
dialogue.translation: No matter what difficulties you encounter, persist in the pursuit of excellence. Successful people often have clear goals and unremitting efforts.
dialogue.translation_id: Tidak peduli kesulitan apa yang Anda hadapi, bertahanlah dalam pengejaran keunggulan. Orang sukses sering memiliki tujuan yang jelas dan usaha tanpa henti.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Lou Ying
dialogue.chinese: 如何在平凡的岗位上追求卓越？
dialogue.pinyin: Rúhé zài píngfán de gǎngwèi shàng zhuīqiú zhuóyuè?
dialogue.translation: How to pursue excellence in an ordinary position?
dialogue.translation_id: Bagaimana mengejar keunggulan dalam posisi biasa?

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zuo Feng
dialogue.chinese: 实现卓越的关键在于持续学习和改进。保持激情，设立高标准，每天进步一点点，终将成就卓越。
dialogue.pinyin: Shíxiàn zhuóyuè de guānjiàn zàiyú chíxù xuéxí hé gǎijìn. Bǎochí jīqíng, shèlì gāo biāozhǔn, měitiān jìnbù yī diǎndiǎn, zhōng jiāng chéngjiù zhuóyuè.
dialogue.translation: The key to achieving excellence lies in continuous learning and improvement. Maintain passion, set high standards, improve a little every day, and you will eventually achieve excellence.
dialogue.translation_id: Kunci mencapai keunggulan terletak pada pembelajaran dan perbaikan berkelanjutan. Pertahankan gairah, tetapkan standar tinggi, tingkatkan sedikit setiap hari, dan Anda akhirnya akan mencapai keunggulan.

exercises.question: What does 追求卓越 (zhuīqiú zhuóyuè) mean?
What does 不仅...而且... express?
exercises.question_id: Apa yang diungkapkan 不仅...而且...?

exercises.question: Complete: 无论遇到什么困难，______坚持追求卓越。
